title: Bulletin Settings
subtitle: Manage categories and the student-group audience allowlist

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Categories appear as filter chips on the feed and as labels on each bulletin.
categories.empty: No categories yet. Add one to get started.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete category "{{ name }}"? Bulletins using it will block the delete.

audiences.title: Audience Allowlist
audiences.description: Student groups in this list can be picked as a bulletin audience. Only allowlisted groups appear in the audience chips when creating a bulletin.
audiences.empty: No groups allowlisted yet. Add one with the picker above.
audiences.removeConfirm: Remove "{{ name }}" from the allowlist? Existing bulletins still targeted at this group are not affected.

form.name: Name
form.activeHint: Inactive categories are hidden from new bulletins but kept on existing ones.
